testcase.name: test_get_property_demo_portfolio
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter14_ingest_visual.py:167: in test_get_property_demo_portfolio assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_upgrade_cart

failure.message:
AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
